mapper.select:
select count(*)
where mem.del_at = 'N'
and mem.use_at = #{srchUseAt}
and (mem.login_id like concat('%', #{srchWord}, '%') or mem.mngr_nm like concat('%', #{srchWord}, '%'))

select
where mem.del_at = 'N'
and mem.use_at = #{srchUseAt}
and (mem.login_id like concat('%', #{srchWord}, '%') or mem.mngr_nm like concat('%', #{srchWord}, '%'))
order by mem.mngr_pid desc
